name: T-UI-21 - Verify that Admin views Plants page with all management controls visible
scenarioId: plants/ui_plants:T-UI-21 - Verify that Admin views Plants page with all management controls visible
methodName: T-UI-21 - Verify that Admin views Plants page with all management controls visible

testSteps.description: Given I log in as Admin with username "admin" and password "admin123"
When I navigate to the plants list page
Then validate the "Add a Plant" button should be visible on the plants page
And the plants table should display columns "Name", "Category", "Price", "Stock", and "Actions"
And each plant row should show Edit and Delete action icons
And the Plants navigation link should be active

exception.message:
[Plants navigation link should be active (highlighted)] 
Expecting value to be true but was false
